collapsableTable.name: Enable table folding
collapsableTable.desc: Allow tables to be folded/unfolded via the toggle button in the table edit toolbar.

collapsibleCodeblockMode.name: Collapsible code block mode
collapsibleCodeblockMode.desc:
- none: disable collapsible code block
 - fold: code blocks will be folded in one line
 - limit_height: code blocks will be limited to a certain height

autoFoldCodeblock.name: Fold code block automatically
autoFoldCodeblock.desc: Fold code block which line count is more than the limit. Only works when mode `fold` or `limit_height` is enabled.

lineCountLimit.name: Line count limit for auto fold
lineCountLimit.desc: The minimum line count of code block which can be folded automatically.

foldedCodeblockStyle.name: Folded codeblock style
foldedCodeblockStyle.desc: Only works when mode `fold` is enabled

codeblockMaxHeight.name: Code block max height
codeblockMaxHeight.desc: Only works when mode `limit_height` is enabled

metadataWarningDesc: 'metadata' internal plugin is disabled. Frontmatter-based `collapsableSections`/`uncollapsableSections` rules will no longer take effect.
